Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(************************************************************************

 Equivalences for products

 ************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.FullyFaithful.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Properties.ContainsAdjEquiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Products.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**
   Suppose, we have a diagram as follows

         π₁       π₂
   x₁ <------ p ------> x₂
   |          |         |
   l₁    ≃    l₃   ≃    l₂
   |     γ₁   |    γ₂   |
   V          V         V
   y₁ <------ q ------> y₂
         ρ₁       ρ₂

   where l₁, l₂, and l₃ are adjoint equivalences.
   If the top row is a product cone, then so is the bottom row
 *)
Section ProductEquivalence.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {x₁ x₂ p y₁ y₂ q : B}
          (π₁ : p --> x₁)
          (π₂ : p --> x₂)
          (cone₁ := make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂)
          (Hp : has_binprod_ump cone₁)
          (ρ₁ : q --> y₁)
          (ρ₂ : q --> y₂)
          (cone₂ := make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂)
          (l₁ : x₁ --> y₁)
          (l₂ : x₂ --> y₂)
          (l₃ : p --> q)
          (Hl₁ : left_adjoint_equivalence l₁)
          (Hl₂ : left_adjoint_equivalence l₂)
          (Hl₃ : left_adjoint_equivalence l₃)
          (γ₁ : invertible_2cell
                  (l₃ · ρ₁)
                  (π₁ · l₁))
          (γ₂ : invertible_2cell
                  (l₃ · ρ₂)
                  (π₂ · l₂)).

  Let r₁ : y₁ --> x₁
    := left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁.
  Let η₁ : invertible_2cell (id₁ _) (l₁ · r₁)
    := left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁.
  Let ε₁ : invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ _)
    := left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁.

  Let r₂ : y₂ --> x₂
    := left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂.
  Let η₂ : invertible_2cell (id₁ _) (l₂ · r₂)
    := left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂.
  Let ε₂ : invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ _)
    := left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂.

  Let r₃ : q --> p
    := left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃.
  Let η₃ : invertible_2cell (id₁ _) (l₃ · r₃)
    := left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃.
  Let ε₃ : invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ _)
    := left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃.

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
binprod_ump_1 cone₂

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
binprod_ump_1 cone₂

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
binprod_1cell c cone₂

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)

η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
B ⟦ c, cone₂ ⟧
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)

η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
invertible_2cell (?φ · binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 c)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
invertible_2cell (?φ · binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (binprod_cone_pr2 c)

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
B ⟦ c, cone₂ ⟧
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
B ⟦ c, p ⟧

      exact (binprod_ump_1cell
               Hp
               (binprod_cone_pr1 c · r₁)
               (binprod_cone_pr2 c · r₂)).
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
invertible_2cell
  (binprod_ump_1cell Hp (binprod_cone_pr1 c · r₁)
     (binprod_cone_pr2 c · r₂) · l₃
   · binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂) (binprod_cone_pr1 c)
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                     _
                     γ₁)
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           _
                           (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1
                              Hp
                              _
                              (binprod_cone_pr1 c · r₁)
                              (binprod_cone_pr2 c · r₂)))
                        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                           (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                 _
                                 ε₁)
                              (runitor_invertible_2cell _))))))).
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
invertible_2cell
  (binprod_ump_1cell Hp (binprod_cone_pr1 c · r₁)
     (binprod_cone_pr2 c · r₂) · l₃
   · binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂) (binprod_cone_pr2 c)
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                     _
                     γ₂)
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           _
                           (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2
                              Hp
                              _
                              (binprod_cone_pr1 c · r₁)
                              (binprod_cone_pr2 c · r₂)))
                        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                           (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                 _
                                 ε₂)
                              (runitor_invertible_2cell _))))))).
  Defined.

  Section UMP2.
    Context {c : B}
            {φ ψ : c --> q}
            (α : φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁)
            (β : φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂).

    Let γ₁' : invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
      := comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell _)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 _
                 η₁)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       _
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          _
                          (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             _
                             (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                _
                                (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _))
                             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                   _
                                   (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                      _
                                      ε₃))
                                (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                   _
                                   (lunitor_invertible_2cell _))))))))).

    Let γ₂' : invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
      := comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell _)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 _
                 η₂)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       _
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          _
                          (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             _
                             (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                _
                                (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _))
                             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                   _
                                   (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                      _
                                      ε₃))
                                (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                   _
                                   (lunitor_invertible_2cell _))))))))).

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
isaprop
  (∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
   ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
   × ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β)

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
isaprop
  (∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
   ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
   × ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
   ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
   × ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
ζ₁ = ζ₂

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
isPredicate
  (λ x : φ ==> ψ,
   x ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
   × x ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β)

x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B

π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B

π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧

ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)

φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁

                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))

x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂

ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧

l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧

l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)

ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)

φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)

                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁

                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁

                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
x: φ ==> ψ
isaprop
  (x ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
   × x ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β)

        apply isapropdirprod ; apply cellset_property.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂

γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))

                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)

× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β

x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)

φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂

                        r₂

                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
H: pr1 ζ₁ ▹ r₃ = pr1 ζ₂ ▹ r₃
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
H: pr1 ζ₁ ▹ r₃ = pr1 ζ₂ ▹ r₃
pr1 ζ₁ ▹ inv_adjequiv (l₃,, Hl₃) =
pr1 ζ₂ ▹ inv_adjequiv (l₃,, Hl₃)

        exact H.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)

ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
pr1 ζ₁ ▹ r₃ = pr1 ζ₂ ▹ r₃

x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂

ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂

l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)

η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁

                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁

                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))

× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
(pr1 ζ₁ ▹ r₃) ▹ π₁ = (pr1 ζ₂ ▹ r₃) ▹ π₁
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator φ r₃ π₁)

x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂

ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧

l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))

                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
lassociator φ r₃ π₁ • ((pr1 ζ₁ ▹ r₃) ▹ π₁) =
lassociator φ r₃ π₁ • ((pr1 ζ₂ ▹ r₃) ▹ π₁)

x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)

        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂

                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)

ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β

          is_iso.
        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
