ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂

                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                        r₂

                        ρ₂ ε₃))

                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)

× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
(pr1 ζ₁ ▹ r₃ · π₁) • lassociator ψ r₃ π₁ =
(pr1 ζ₂ ▹ r₃ · π₁) • lassociator ψ r₃ π₁

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
pr1 ζ₁ ▹ r₃ · π₁ = pr1 ζ₂ ▹ r₃ · π₁

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
is_invertible_2cell (φ ◃ γ₁' ^-1)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
(φ ◃ γ₁' ^-1) • (pr1 ζ₁ ▹ r₃ · π₁) =
(φ ◃ γ₁' ^-1) • (pr1 ζ₂ ▹ r₃ · π₁)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
is_invertible_2cell (φ ◃ γ₁' ^-1)

          is_iso.
        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
(φ ◃ γ₁' ^-1) • (pr1 ζ₁ ▹ r₃ · π₁) =
(φ ◃ γ₁' ^-1) • (pr1 ζ₂ ▹ r₃ · π₁)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B

π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)

ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)

φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))

              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
(pr1 ζ₁ ▹ ρ₁ · r₁) • (ψ ◃ γ₁' ^-1) =
(pr1 ζ₂ ▹ ρ₁ · r₁) • (ψ ◃ γ₁' ^-1)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂

ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧

l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃

                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂

                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                        r₂

                        ρ₂ ε₃))

                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)

ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
pr1 ζ₁ ▹ ρ₁ · r₁ = pr1 ζ₂ ▹ ρ₁ · r₁

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator φ ρ₁ r₁)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
rassociator φ ρ₁ r₁ • (pr1 ζ₁ ▹ ρ₁ · r₁) =
rassociator φ ρ₁ r₁ • (pr1 ζ₂ ▹ ρ₁ · r₁)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator φ ρ₁ r₁)

          is_iso.
        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂

                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
rassociator φ ρ₁ r₁ • (pr1 ζ₁ ▹ ρ₁ · r₁) =
rassociator φ ρ₁ r₁ • (pr1 ζ₂ ▹ ρ₁ · r₁)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
((pr1 ζ₁ ▹ ρ₁) ▹ r₁) • rassociator ψ ρ₁ r₁ =
((pr1 ζ₂ ▹ ρ₁) ▹ r₁) • rassociator ψ ρ₁ r₁

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
(pr1 ζ₁ ▹ ρ₁) ▹ r₁ = (pr1 ζ₂ ▹ ρ₁) ▹ r₁

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
pr1 ζ₁ ▹ ρ₁ = pr1 ζ₂ ▹ ρ₁

        exact (pr12 ζ₁ @ !(pr12 ζ₂)).

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂

l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)

        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂

ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator φ r₃ π₂)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
lassociator φ r₃ π₂ • ((pr1 ζ₁ ▹ r₃) ▹ π₂) =
lassociator φ r₃ π₂ • ((pr1 ζ₂ ▹ r₃) ▹ π₂)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator φ r₃ π₂)

          is_iso.

x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂

ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)

η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)

φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃

                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))

× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β

x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂

ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃

                 r₂))

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))

                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂

                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))

                        r₂

                        ρ₂ ε₃))
