ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
(pr1 ζ₁ ▹ ρ₂) ▹ r₂ = (pr1 ζ₂ ▹ ρ₂) ▹ r₂

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : φ ==> ψ,
ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 cone₂ = α
× ζ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 cone₂ = β
pr1 ζ₁ ▹ ρ₂ = pr1 ζ₂ ▹ ρ₂

        exact (pr22 ζ₁ @ !(pr22 ζ₂)).
    Qed.

    Let α' : φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
      := fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
           (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
           (rassociator _ _ _
            • (_ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
            • lassociator _ _ _
            • (rassociator _ _ _ ▹ _)
            • ((_ ◃ ε₃) ▹ _)
            • (runitor _ ▹ _)
            • α
            • (rinvunitor _ ▹ _)
            • ((_ ◃ ε₃^-1) ▹ _)
            • (lassociator _ _ _ ▹ _)
            • rassociator _ _ _
            • (_ ◃ γ₁)
            • lassociator _ _ _).

    Let β' : φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
      := fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
           (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
           (rassociator _ _ _
            • (_ ◃ γ₂^-1)
            • lassociator _ _ _
            • (rassociator _ _ _ ▹ _)
            • ((_ ◃ ε₃) ▹ _)
            • (runitor _ ▹ _)
            • β
            • (rinvunitor _ ▹ _)
            • ((_ ◃ ε₃^-1) ▹ _)
            • (lassociator _ _ _ ▹ _)
            • rassociator _ _ _
            • (_ ◃ γ₂)
            • lassociator _ _ _).

    Definition has_binprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell
      : φ ==> ψ
      := rinvunitor _
         • (_ ◃ ε₃^-1)
         • lassociator _ _ _
         • (binprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β' ▹ l₃)
         • rassociator _ _ _
         • (_ ◃ ε₃)
         • runitor _.

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
has_binprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell ▹ ρ₁ =
α

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
has_binprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell ▹ ρ₁ =
α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
((((((rinvunitor φ • (φ ◃ ε₃ ^-1))
     • lassociator φ r₃ l₃)
    • (binprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β' ▹ l₃))
   • rassociator ψ r₃ l₃) • (ψ ◃ ε₃)) • runitor ψ)
▹ ρ₁ = α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
((((((rinvunitor φ ▹ ρ₁) • ((φ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
    • (lassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
   • ((binprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β' ▹ l₃) ▹ ρ₁))
  • (rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
• (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁) = α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
(rinvunitor φ ▹ ρ₁)
• (((φ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁)
   • ((lassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
      • (((binprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β' ▹ l₃) ▹ ρ₁)
         • ((rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
            • (((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)))))) =
α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
((binprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β' ▹ l₃) ▹ ρ₁)
• ((rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
   • (((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker ρ₁
   (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator φ r₃ l₃)) ^-1
• ((is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker ρ₁
      (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker φ
         (is_invertible_2cell_inv ε₃))) ^-1
   • ((is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker ρ₁
         (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor φ)) ^-1 • α))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
    (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
       (((((((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
             • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
            • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
           • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
          • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
         • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁))
    (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
       (((((((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
             • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
            • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
           • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
          • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
         • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂))
  ▹ l₃) ▹ ρ₁)
• ((rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
   • (((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))) =
(rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
• (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁) • α))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
• (((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
       (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
          ((((((((... • ...) • α)
                • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
               • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
              • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
             • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁))
           • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁))
       (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
          ((((((((... • ...) • β)
                • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
               • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
              • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
             • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂))
           • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂)) ▹ l₃) ▹ ρ₁)
   • ((rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
      • (((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)))) =
lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
• ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
   • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁) • α)))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)

        is_iso.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) •

  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))

          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
• (((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
       (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
          ((((((((... • ...) • α)
                • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
               • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
              • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
             • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁))
           • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁))
       (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
          ((((((((... • ...) • β)
                • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
               • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
              • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
             • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂))
           • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂)) ▹ l₃) ▹ ρ₁)
   • ((rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
      • (((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)))) =
lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
• ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
   • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁) • α)))

β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))

           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))

(((lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
   • ((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
         (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
            ((((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₁))
                • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))

  • (rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
