B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
((((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
      (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
         (((((((... • α) • (... ▹ ρ₁))
              • ((ψ ◃ ...) ▹ ρ₁))
             • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
            • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
           • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁))
          • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁))
      (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
         (((((((... • β) • (... ▹ ρ₂))
              • ((ψ ◃ ...) ▹ ρ₂))
             • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
            • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
           • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂))
          • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂)) ▹ l₃ · ρ₁)
   • lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
  • (rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
• (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁) =
(((lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
   • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
 • (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
is_invertible_2cell (φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
(φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
• (((((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
         (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
            ((((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₁))
                • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
               • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
              • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁))
             • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁))
         (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
            ((((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₂))
                • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
               • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
              • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂))
             • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂)) ▹ 
       l₃ · ρ₁) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
     • (rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • 
    ((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)) =
(φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
• ((((lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
      • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • 
     ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
is_invertible_2cell (φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)

        is_iso.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
(φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
• (((((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
         (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
            ((((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₁))
                • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
               • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
              • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁))
             • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁))
         (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
            ((((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₂))
                • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
               • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
              • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂))
             • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂)) ▹ l₃ · ρ₁)
      • lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
     • (rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
   • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)) =
(φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
• ((((lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
      • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
    • (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂

ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)

ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁

                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))

        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂

                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell

                        r₂

                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)

  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))

            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) •

  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)

        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))

     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) •

(((((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
    • (binprod_ump_2cell Hp
         (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
            ((((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₁))
                • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
               • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
              • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁))
             • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁))
         (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
            ((((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₂))
                • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
               • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
              • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂))
             • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂)) ▹ l₃ · ρ₁))
   • lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
  • (rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
• (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁) =
(((((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1) • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
   • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
 • (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
(((((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
       (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
          ((((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₁))
              • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
             • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁))
           • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁))
       (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
          ((((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₂))
              • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
             • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂))
           • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂)) ▹ π₁ · l₁)
    • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
  • (rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
• (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁) =
(((((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1) • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
   • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
 • (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂

γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))

              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃

                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂

                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
• ((((((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
          (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
             (((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₁))
                • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
               • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁))
              • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁))
          (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
             (((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₂))
                • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
               • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂))
              • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂)) ▹ 
        π₁ · l₁) • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1))
      • lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
     • (rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • 
    ((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)) =
rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
• ((((((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1) • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
      • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • 
     ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁)

        is_iso.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
• ((((((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
          (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
             (((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₁))
                • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
               • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁))
              • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁))
          (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
             (((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₂))
                • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
               • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂))
              • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂)) ▹ π₁ · l₁)
       • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1))
      • lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
     • (rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
   • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)) =
rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
• ((((((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1) • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
      • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
    • (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
(((((rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
     • (binprod_ump_2cell Hp
          (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
             (((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₁))
                • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
               • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁))
              • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁))
          (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
             (((((... • ...) • (... ▹ ρ₂))
                • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
               • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂))
              • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂)) ▹ π₁ · l₁))
    • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
  • (rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
• (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁) =
(((((rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁ • (φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1))
    • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
   • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
 • (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
(((((((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
         (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
            ((((... • ...) • rassociator (...) l₃ ρ₁)
              • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁))
             • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁))
         (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
            ((((... • ...) • rassociator (...) l₃ ρ₂)
              • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂))
             • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂)) ▹ π₁) ▹ l₁)
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁) • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1))
   • lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
  • (rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
• (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁) =
(((((rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁ • (φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1))
    • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
   • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)) • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁))
 • (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
    (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
       (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
        • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
           • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
              • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
                 • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)
                    • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)
                       • (α
                          • ((... ▹ ρ₁) • (... • ...))))))))))
    (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
       (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₂ l₂
        • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₂ ^-1)
           • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂
              • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂)
                 • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)
                    • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)
                       • (β
                          • ((... ▹ ρ₂) • (... • ...))))))))))
  ▹ π₁) ▹ l₁)
• (rassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁
   • ((ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
         • ((rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
            • (((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)))))) =
rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
• ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
   • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
      • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
         • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁) • α)))))

x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B

π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧

ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))

((binprod_ump_2cell Hp

       (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
        • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                        r₂
