                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
?b =
rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
• ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
   • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
      • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
         • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁) • α)))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
((binprod_ump_2cell Hp
    (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
       (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
        • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
           • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
              • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
                 • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)
                    • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)
                       • (α
                          • ((... ▹ ρ₁) • (... • ...))))))))))
    (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
       (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₂ l₂
        • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₂ ^-1)
           • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂
              • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂)
                 • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)
                    • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)
                       • (β
                          • ((... ▹ ρ₂) • (... • ...))))))))))
  ▹ π₁) ▹ l₁)
• (rassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁
   • ((ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
         • ((rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
            • (((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂

ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)

ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))

                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁

                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))

                        r₂

                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) •

  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
(binprod_ump_2cell Hp
   (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
      (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
       • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
          • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
             • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
                • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)
                   • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)
                      • (α
                         • ((rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)
                            • ((... ▹ ρ₁)
                               • (... • ...)))))))))))
   (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
      (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₂ l₂
       • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₂ ^-1)
          • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂
             • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂)
                • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)
                   • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)
                      • (β
                         • ((rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂)
                            • ((... ▹ ρ₂)
                               • (... • ...)))))))))))
 ▹ π₁) ▹ l₁ = ?y'

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
binprod_ump_2cell Hp
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
     (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
      • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
         • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
            • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
               • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)
                  • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)
                     • (α
                        • ((rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)
                           • (((ψ ◃ ...) ▹ ρ₁)
                              • ((... ▹ ρ₁)
                                 • (... • ...))))))))))))
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₂
     (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₂ l₂
      • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₂ ^-1)
         • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂
            • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂)
               • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)
                  • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)
                     • (β
                        • ((rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂)
                           • (((ψ ◃ ...) ▹ ρ₂)
                              • ((... ▹ ρ₂)
                                 • (... • ...))))))))))))
▹ π₁ = ?t2

        apply( binprod_ump_2cell_pr1 Hp).
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
(adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
   (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
    • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
       • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
          • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
             • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)
                • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)
                   • (α
                      • ((rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)
                         • (((ψ ◃ ...) ▹ ρ₁)
                            • ((... ▹ ρ₁)
                               • (... • ...)))))))))))
 ▹ l₁)
• (rassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁
   • ((ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
         • ((rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
            • (((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)))))) =
rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
• ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
   • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
      • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
         • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁) • α)))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂

                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (rassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁
   • ((ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
         • ((rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
            • (((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))))))
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂

ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)

φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁

                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))

                        r₂

                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)

     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
  (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
   • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
         • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
            • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)
               • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)
                  • (α
                     • ((rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)
                        • 
                        (((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁)
                        • 
                        ((lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
                        • 
                        (rassociator (...) l₃ ρ₁
                        • 
                        (... • ...)))))))))))) ▹ l₁ =
(rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
 • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
    • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
       • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
          • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁) • α))))))
• ?Hε ^-1

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (rassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁
   • ((ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
         • ((rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
            • (((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))))))

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
is_invertible_2cell ε₃

        apply ε₃.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
  (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
   • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
         • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
            • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)
               • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)
                  • (α
                     • ((rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)
                        • (((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁)
                           • ((lassociator ψ r₃ l₃
                               ▹ ρ₁)
                              • (rassociator (...) l₃
                                   ρ₁ • (... • ...))))))))))))
▹ l₁ =
(rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
 • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
    • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
       • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
          • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁) • α))))))
• (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁)
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (ψ · r₃)
           (is_invertible_2cell_inv γ₁))
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (ψ · r₃)
              l₃ ρ₁)
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker ρ₁
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator ψ r₃
                    l₃))
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker ρ₁
                    (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ
                       (let X := pr2 ε₃ in X)))
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker ρ₁
                    (is_invertible_2cell_runitor ψ)))))))
  ^-1

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
  (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
   • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
         • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
            • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)
               • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)
                  • (α
                     • ((rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)
                        • (((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁)
                           • ((lassociator ψ r₃ l₃
                               ▹ ρ₁)
                              • (rassociator (...) l₃
                                   ρ₁ • (... • ...))))))))))))
▹ l₁ =
(rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
 • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
    • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
       • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
          • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁) • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁) • α))))))
• ((((((rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁) • ((ψ ◃ (pr2 ε₃) ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
adj_equiv_fully_faithful_inv_cell Hl₁
  (rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
   • ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
         • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
            • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)
               • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)
                  • (α
                     • ((rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)
                        • (((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁)
                           • ((lassociator ψ r₃ l₃
                               ▹ ρ₁)
                              • (rassociator (...) l₃
                                   ρ₁ • (... • ...))))))))))))
▹ l₁ =
rassociator (φ · r₃) π₁ l₁
• ((φ · r₃ ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
   • (lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁
      • ((rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
         • (((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)
            • ((runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)
               • (α
                  • ((rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁)
                     • (((ψ ◃ (pr2 ε₃) ^-1) ▹ ρ₁)
                        • ((lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁)
                           • (rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃
                                ρ₁
                              • ((ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)
                                 • lassociator
                                     (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁)))))))))))

      apply (fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map_eq
               (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)).
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
has_binprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell ▹ ρ₂ =
β

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
has_binprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell ▹ ρ₂ =
β

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
((((((rinvunitor φ • (φ ◃ ε₃ ^-1))
     • lassociator φ r₃ l₃)
    • (binprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β' ▹ l₃))
   • rassociator ψ r₃ l₃) • (ψ ◃ ε₃)) • runitor ψ)
▹ ρ₂ = β

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ c, q ⟧
α: φ · ρ₁ ==> ψ · ρ₁
β: φ · ρ₂ ==> ψ · ρ₂
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) η₁)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₁
           (l₁ · r₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₁ l₁
                 r₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₁) r₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₁
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₁
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₁))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₁) (ρ₁ · r₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) η₂)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₃ π₂
           (l₂ · r₂))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell π₂ l₂
                 r₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₂)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell r₃
                    (l₃ · ρ₂) r₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       r₂
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        r₃ l₃ ρ₂))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂ ε₃))
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        r₂
                        (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        ρ₂))))))))): invertible_2cell (r₃ · π₂) (ρ₂ · r₂)
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₁)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₁ l₁
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₁)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₁)) • α)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₁))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₁))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₁))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₁) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₁)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₁ l₁): φ · r₃ · π₁ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₁
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hl₂)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) π₂ l₂
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (φ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂)
            • (rassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
           • ((φ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂)) • 
          (runitor φ ▹ ρ₂)) • β)
        • (rinvunitor ψ ▹ ρ₂))
       • ((ψ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
      • (lassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
     • rassociator (ψ · r₃) l₃ ρ₂) • 
    (ψ · r₃ ◃ γ₂)) • lassociator (ψ · r₃) π₂ l₂): φ · r₃ · π₂ ==> ψ · r₃ · π₂
((((((rinvunitor φ ▹ ρ₂) • ((φ ◃ ε₃ ^-1) ▹ ρ₂))
    • (lassociator φ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂))
   • ((binprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β' ▹ l₃) ▹ ρ₂))
  • (rassociator ψ r₃ l₃ ▹ ρ₂)) • ((ψ ◃ ε₃) ▹ ρ₂))
• (runitor ψ ▹ ρ₂) = β

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
π₁: B ⟦ p, x₁ ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ p, x₂ ⟧
cone₁:= make_binprod_cone p π₁ π₂: binprod_cone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_binprod_ump cone₁
ρ₁: B ⟦ q, y₁ ⟧
ρ₂: B ⟦ q, y₂ ⟧
cone₂:= make_binprod_cone q ρ₁ ρ₂: binprod_cone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₁) (π₁ · l₁)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₃ · ρ₂) (π₂ · l₂)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
